issues.title: Double tasks generated for Loan Simple leads in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were receiving duplicate tasks across pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot, which HubSpot support helped resolve. HAs and TCs were affected by redundant task notifications.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the extra tasks.

issues.title: Loan officer change not reflected in automated agent emails
issues.desc: When a loan officer was updated on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous loan officer rather than the newly assigned one. The issue was reported for a specific deal where the LO had changed from Paul to Julie Yocum. The fix was applied by Luis on the product side.
issues.workaround: For deals with LO changes during the impact window, manually resend the agent introduction email with the correct loan officer information.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: Deals marked as Closed Lost or Transferred continued to generate post-referral workflow check-in tasks instead of halting. HAs were receiving irrelevant follow-up tasks for lost or transferred deals. Madelaine made a tweak to the workflow filters to resolve this.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any check-in tasks that were erroneously generated for deals marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage reverted and reset
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, reverted to a prior stage, and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow and associated tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that deal stage re-enrollment criteria did not include the Offer Accepted stage. Madelaine updated the re-enrollment criteria to fix this.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that cycled through Offer Accepted more than once during the impact window to ensure TCs receive the correct tasks.

issues.title: MRC deals moved to Offer Accepted not enrolling into TC workflow
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering TC workflow enrollment or generating TC tasks. The issue was investigated with HubSpot support and a fix was confirmed. MRC deals frequently have no lender assigned, though this was not confirmed as the root cause.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals that were moved to Offer Accepted during the impact window into the TC workflow and send closing info collection emails manually.
